architectural_notes: Plan follows the established signal→mapping→param→render pipeline exactly. Two new fields (curveSoftness, structureComplexity) are added to VisualParams and flow through the same mapSignalsToVisuals→evolveParams→draw chain as existing params.
All required input signals (touchCapable, devicePixelRatio, hardwareConcurrency, screenWidth, screenHeight) already exist in BrowserSignals — no new data collection needed.
Pass-through in evolveParams matches the existing pattern for density and motionAmplitude — device-derived structural params stay stable within a session, which is correct.
No new files are created; changes are additive to existing modules. The VisualParams interface extension is the only breaking change, and all consumers are updated in the plan.
Privacy model is preserved: all outputs are normalized 0–1 numbers, no raw browser strings are exposed.

concerns.description: Step 6 modifies particle count at init time based on structureComplexity, but init() receives params once. If structureComplexity were ever to evolve (future change), the count would be stale. Currently safe because the plan explicitly passes it through unchanged in evolveParams.
concerns.suggestion: Document the invariant that structureComplexity is init-time-only in a code comment.

concerns.description: The curveSoftness threshold (>=0.5 → circles, <0.5 → rects) creates a binary visual split rather than a smooth gradient. This is intentional per the plan's rationale (branch prediction, stable within session), but reduces the expressiveness of the 0–1 range.
concerns.suggestion: Acceptable for v1. Could later interpolate corner radius for smoother transition if desired.

concerns.description: Step 7 (renderLoop.ts) is correctly identified as a no-op verification step. computeDefaultParams calls mapSignalsToVisuals with defaults that already include touchCapable=null and screenWidth/Height from window — the new helpers will produce sensible mid-range defaults automatically.

files_impact_summary.src/visual/mappings.ts: Add 2 fields to VisualParams, 2 helper functions, 2 lines in return object
files_impact_summary.src/visual/evolution.ts: Add 2 pass-through lines in evolveParams return
files_impact_summary.src/visual/systems/particleField.ts: Shape branching in draw(), count scaling in init()
files_impact_summary.src/visual/renderLoop.ts: Verify only — no code change expected
files_impact_summary.src/visual/types.ts: No change needed — VisualParams is in mappings.ts
